triage: routine, well-specified UI task on a fixed engine contract -> 3-worker fleet (per PRD Section 8 triage rule, matching runs 1-2)

ledger.focus: Focus on test rigor and edge cases.
Focus on accessibility and faithfulness to the spec's display contracts.

gate_extensions.name: piped-eof
gate_extensions.command: printf '' | python3 -m word_garden  # must exit 0, no traceback

gate_extensions.name: engine-untouched
gate_extensions.command: git diff --quiet <base>..<branch> -- word_garden/game.py word_garden/words.py word_garden/__init__.py tests/test_game.py tests/test_words.py
